name: Edge: uncertainty extreme — all alternatives HIGH uncertainty + GOLD at material risk
rubric_notes: All three alternatives have HIGH uncertainty — the rubric's 'reliable alt' definition (LOW or MEDIUM uncertainty) is not satisfied. Stock cover (200h) > delay (144h), so rules 1-4 don't fire. Rule 5 requires reliable_alt; the all-HIGH alt pool fails the requirement. Default → wait_and_monitor. But: GOLD customer at material risk (100h < 144h delay) — system might rationally engage spot market (emergency_spot_buy) as a hedge to avoid betting the GOLD relationship on an untested supplier. acceptable_actions tolerates both wait and spot_buy. acceptable_suppliers intentionally empty — recommending an HIGH-uncertainty supplier here would be the wrong system behavior. Confidence MEDIUM because the wait-vs-spot tradeoff is real.
